text: Implemented CSRPattern/CSCPattern with checked owned construction, private shared major/minor storage, equality/hash, lane and coordinate traversal, zero-copy transpose, one-copy bind, and closing single-owner value builders. CSR/CSC expose pattern and rebind; numeric map/scale retain explicit zeros while prune remains structure-changing. Added adversarial/ownership/empty/graph tests and docs. Verification: all 71 gale.sparse tests pass on JVM and Scala.js; optimized JS sparse-map reports pattern-reuse=1/op and 600 ns/op; JVM n=128 sparse-map fell from 7320 to 2104 B/op (payload 2048 B).
